title: Build FizzBuzz CLI in Go

steps.description: Implement FizzBuzz logic in the domain layer as value objects and entities.
steps.done_condition: FizzBuzz logic implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Define ports for FizzBuzz logic to allow interaction from other layers.
steps.done_condition: Ports defined and functional unit tests created.

steps.description: Create secondary adapters if needed for data storage or retrieval (not required for FizzBuzz).
steps.done_condition: No secondary adapters implemented as not needed.

steps.description: Implement the primary adapter to provide a command-line interface for the FizzBuzz application.
steps.done_condition: CLI implemented and basic functionality tested.

steps.description: Implement use cases to process user input and interact with FizzBuzz domain logic.
Wire up the composition root for the entire application.
steps.done_condition: Composition root wired and confirmed to work.

steps.description: Create integration tests to validate the full FizzBuzz CLI functionality.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests run successfully and validate CLI functionality.

successCriteria: The FizzBuzz CLI produces correct outputs based on user input.
All defined layers and ports interact without issues.
